title: Bringing Up Bébé
author: Pamela Druckerman
subline: One American mother discovers the wisdom of French parenting.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The Eiffel Tower, drawn with hairlines, the French flag proportions in red/white/blue. But inverted: this is a BABY-RAISING tower, so it's got a stroller silhouette at the base. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1800)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Eiffel silhouette (purely as a Paris mark) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5">
      <path d="M-80 0 L -160 -400 L -40 -400 L 0 -560 L 40 -400 L 160 -400 L 80 0 Z"/>
      <line x1="-130" y1="-280" x2="130" y2="-280"/>
      <line x1="-100" y1="-160" x2="100" y2="-160"/>
      <line x1="-60" y1="-40" x2="60" y2="-40"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small three-color tricolore bar at the top of the tower — the only red (left band) and the only blue (right band) -->
    <rect x="-12" y="-580" width="8" height="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <rect x="-4" y="-580" width="8" height="40" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <rect x="4" y="-580" width="8" height="40" fill="#7C3AED"/>
    <!-- A small stroller glyph at the base (4 wheels + hood) — the actual subject of the book -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5">
      <path d="M-30 30 L 30 30 L 25 80 L -25 80 Z"/>
      <circle cx="-20" cy="90" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="90" r="6"/>
      <path d="M-30 30 L -45 0"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Eiffel Tower rendered in hairlines at the bottom, with a small stroller glyph at its base — Paris + the book. A tricolore bar (red/white/violet) at the top is the only chromatic accent. 480px mixed-case whisper title dominates the top. The single red is the tricolore's left band.
